primary_field: platform architecture continuity (MCP tool surfaces, schema design, Chessboard agent roles, freshness/fingerprint primitives)

adjacents.field: Supabase schema design (upekrithen / public schema separation)
Firebase hosting targets and GCP project layout
agent session lifecycle and Chessboard roles (B/K/R/P)

provenance: Instantiated B117 per #2276 Scribe Coverage Discovery — filling the architecture_continuity category blind spot identified by K437 SEALED-50 run.

observation: K436 Cathedral MCP tools registered: log_tidbit (verify-action ledger append), fates_route (Three Fates pipeline entry point), scribe_log (Scribe-specific tablet append), consult_scribes (member-query retrieval over primary + adjacents with since_ts filter). All registered at librarian-mcp/src/server.ts lines 2323-2344. Implementation modules under src/scribes/: cathedral.ts, consult.ts, fates.ts, registry.ts. 23/23 tests green. Commit 6c47d9b tagged v-cathedral-tools-K436.

Three Fates Routing Pipeline: Clotho (Spinner) extracts candidate themes from session content via named-entity regex. Lachesis (Measurer) scores themes against registered Scribes' primary + adjacent fields with expertise-level-weighted scoring. Atropos (Cutter) selects top-K Scribes (cap 5), emits dispatch directives, flags coverage gaps when theme routes to fewer than 3 Scribes (triply-redundant-witness threshold). Runs once per exchange, O(themes × active-Scribes) — scales to Cathedral-size registries without per-Scribe scan.

K429 fingerprint primitive: SHA-256 tree-hash over sorted (file path, file modification time) tuples across 12 declared scan directories (7,861 files tracked as of B117). Fingerprint persisted to librarian-mcp/index/last_build_fingerprint.json. FingerprintRecord fields: timestamp, elapsedMs, mode ('full' | 'incremental'), treeHash, fileCount, fileMtimes. Committed B117 e797320.

FreshnessReport three-state vocabulary: FRESH (current tree fingerprint equals persisted fingerprint; agent may trust index without rebuild). DRIFT (persisted fingerprint exists but current tree diverges; per-file changedFiles/newFiles/deletedFiles lists populated). UNKNOWN (no persisted fingerprint; first session after fresh checkout or fingerprint corruption; agent MUST NOT assume FRESH — default action full rebuild). Distinguishes UNKNOWN from DRIFT is the specific novel contribution of #2273.

K429 rebuild performance: full rebuild 27.5s across 7,861 files / 12 scan directories. Incremental rebuild ~3s when fingerprint match with <200 file changes. Fingerprint-only freshness check <500ms. Session-start hook emits report to agent before any corpus-dependent tool call executes.
canonical_ref: K429 Knight report B116 + K429 commit e797320 B117

observation: Scribe expertise structure: each Scribe declares ONE primary field (Level 1, PhD-deep canonical keeper) plus up to 12 adjacent fields at declared levels 2-12. Tiers: Levels 2-3 = PhD-adjacent (strong retrieval weight), Levels 4-6 = junior-adjacent (moderate weight), Levels 7-12 = ancillary (low weight but covered). Any topic covered by >=3 Scribes through overlapping adjacents = triply-redundant witness property.

Chessboard agent roles: B = Bishop (Claude Opus, Foreman, coordinates all agents + roadmap + dispatches). K = Knight (Cursor, code synthesis + test writing + commits). R = Rook (Gemini). P = Pawn (Perplexity, she/her). Founder = AI Tuner. Knight is Cursor, NOT Rook — Founder sometimes says 'Rook' by accident.

Pedestal Stake two-track separation (K431/K432/K433 implementation, verified 18/18 + 22/22 tests green): Pedestal tables live in upekrithen schema (NOT public). No foreign keys to public.members — separation enforced at schema level. upekrithen.pedestal_issuance_log has NO UPDATE/DELETE via RLS (append-only). user_id fields reference auth.users, NOT members. Rolling annual-raise helper tracks $5M cap.
canonical_ref: K427 WS1 Phase 3 + K432 migration + K433 admin dashboard

observation: Chapter 2 Mellon multilingual architecture: librarian_context(intent=X, lang='es') resolves sibling files by language code (e.g., r9v2_base_es.md sibling to r9v2_base.md). Falls back to English AND includes lang_fallback response field listing which file paths fell back. Does NOT silently serve English. Canonical numbers preserved verbatim across languages (Arabic digits, no locale-formatting breach for canonical values).

9 Firebase hosting targets across 2+ GCP projects. MrOz (mroz-74540): main, biz, net, org, the2ndsecond. LianaBanyan (lianabanyan-403dc): museum, upekrithen, likely hexisle. Switch project selector before editing Firebase config. Org policy on lianabanyan-403dc has allowedPolicyMemberDomains set to ALLOW (B115 K434) so Cloud Run public demo can grant allUsers run.invoker.

Session-start hook behavior (K429): agent_start -> read fingerprint.json -> compute current tree fingerprint -> report status -> if FRESH proceed, if DRIFT with churn<threshold auto-incremental-rebuild (~3s), if DRIFT with churn>=threshold warn-and-prompt-operator, if UNKNOWN full rebuild (block until complete) -> write new fingerprint post-rebuild. Escape hatch: npm run rebuild:full.

Tablet storage semantics: append-only JSONL files at stitchpunks/scribes/scribe_<id>.jsonl. First line = header with Scribe metadata. Subsequent lines = entries with {ts, session, observation, source, canonical_ref}. Truncation/edit-in-place forbidden by convention and enforced in log_tidbit/scribe_log MCP tools. Filesystem-level append atomicity is the durability substrate — tablets accumulate growing, immutable records.

O(1) domain-index retrieval via primary-first pass: consult_scribes matches query against Scribe primary fields first (RAM-access pattern, indexed not scan). Adjacent expansion only if primary matches produce insufficient top-K entries; expansion weighted by declared expertise level (Level-2 gets higher score than Level-7). since_ts filter supports 'what's new in Cathedral since my last session?' queries. Observed p95 latency 1.6ms against 200ms target (K436 production test).
canonical_ref: AA_FORMAL_2270 mechanism section + K436 performance test

observation: Critical Architecture gotcha (K436 discovery): librarian-mcp/package.json and librarian-mcp/tsconfig.json are gitignored by root .gitignore line 214 (*.json rule). Fresh clone of LianaBanyanPlatform cannot build librarian-mcp. K441 Half B will fix with explicit ! negations in .gitignore + git add -f for specific runtime-critical files. Bombproof fix pending K441 dispatch.
canonical_ref: K436 Knight report commit discovery + PROMPT_KNIGHT_K441

observation: MCP server in-memory cache gotcha (B117 observation): after npm run rebuild writes fresh content to index/dropzones.json and index/overview.json on disk, the running MCP server continues serving from cached in-memory index. No auto-reload. Founder must restart Cursor OR kill librarian-mcp server subprocess for MCP client to reconnect to fresh server. K441 Half D (added B117) will fix durably via fingerprint-based cache invalidation on each tool call.
